<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Namesilo](https://www.namesilo.com/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/namesilo/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "namesilo"
  dnsCredentials:
    # NAMESILO_API_KEY: Client ID
    apiKey: ""
    # NAMESILO_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # NAMESILO_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60), it is better to set larger than 15 minutes
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # NAMESILO_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 3600), should be in [3600, 2592000]
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
